infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: Kash uses speech recognition to turn what you say into a transaction entry — for example, "Spent 12 on coffee" becomes a logged expense.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Kash listens through your microphone so you can log a transaction by speaking it out loud instead of typing.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Kash uses the camera to photograph receipts and read the amount, merchant, and date so you can log them as transactions.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Kash reads receipt photos from your library to extract the amount, merchant, and date for a transaction.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow $(PRODUCT_NAME) to read photos of receipts from your library.
plugins.cameraPermission: Allow $(PRODUCT_NAME) to take photos of receipts.
